hook: Caller asks OTP. SMS app shows account change before sharing.
primary_text: SMS Classifier shows when an OTP appears tied to account changes, so you can review before sharing it with someone claiming delivery.
headline: Caller asks OTP. SMS app shows account change before sharing.
description: See the OTP context before sharing codes under pressure.
